raw.unsupported_reason: RAW is the full ~1.5 GB HDFS.log member; not committed. Reacquisition is impractical in the session disk allowance and exact streaming BPE tokenization is out of scope for this slice, so RAW/Qodec-on-RAW token counts are UNSUPPORTED.
